I'm not able to access files on your local filesystem — I can only analyze images that are directly uploaded or embedded in the conversation. The path `C:\dev\sleepforge\data\analysis\philosophers-winners\K5fDd7Bmw1I.jpg` is on your machine, which I have no access to.

**To get the analysis you need, please either:**

1. **Upload the image directly** into this chat (drag and drop or attach it), or
2. **Paste a public URL** to the image if it's hosted online (e.g., the actual YouTube thumbnail URL like `https://i.ytimg.com/vi/K5fDd7Bmw1I/maxresdefault.jpg`)

> 💡 Quick tip: Since the filename appears to be a YouTube video ID (`K5fDd7Bmw1I`), you can likely fetch the thumbnail directly at:
> `https://i.ytimg.com/vi/K5fDd7Bmw1I/maxresdefault.jpg`

Share the image via one of those methods and I'll return the exact JSON structure you specified.
